stories.title: NBA Finals Game 3 TONIGHT — Trump, MSG, and a Sweep on the Line
stories.angle: Game 3 tips off tonight at MSG, 8:30 PM ET on ABC; Knicks 2-0 series lead; first NBA Finals game at MSG since June 25, 1999; Trump attending with no-bag policy and TSA-style screening; Knicks -2.5 favs, total 216.5; O.G. Anunoby: "It's going to be crazy"

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
MSG hasn't hosted an NBA Finals game since 1999.

Tonight that changes. Game 3. Knicks vs. Spurs. 8:30 PM ET on ABC.

No team has EVER come back from 3-0 in the Finals.

The Garden is ready. #KnicksTape #NBAFinals

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
President Trump is attending tonight's NBA Finals Game 3 at MSG.

No bags. No outdoor watch parties. TSA-style screening. Arrive 2+ hours early.

Still the biggest night in New York sports in 27 years. #KnicksTape #NBAFinals

article.headline: MSG Hosts Its First NBA Finals Game Since 1999 — A President, a Sweep, and 53 Years of Waiting

stories.title: Giannis Trade Saga — Heat "Closing In," But Roster Concerns Linger
stories.angle: Reports June 7: people around league believe Heat are "closing in" on Giannis deal; Heat offer is "player and pick heavy"; Giannis has questions about what Miami roster would look like post-trade; June 23 NBA Draft deadline; Bucks co-owner Jimmy Haslam wants it resolved by draft

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Giannis update:

The Heat are "closing in" per league sources.

But Giannis has one big question: what does Miami's roster look like AFTER the trade?

June 23 deadline. Bucks want picks + players. Clock is ticking. #NBA #GiannisAntetokounmpo

article.headline: The Heat Are Closing In on Giannis — But He Has One Big Question for Miami

- NBC Sports: "Giannis trade rumors: Thunder not interested, Giannis concerned about Heat roster"

**Key verified facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Heat are frontrunners for Giannis trade [HIGH — multiple sources]
- Giannis has concerns about roster composition post-trade [HIGH — HoopsHype]
- Heat package is "player and pick heavy" [HIGH — HoopsHype via Bucks writer]
- Bucks co-owner Jimmy Haslam wants situation resolved by June 23 draft [HIGH]
- Thunder not interested in Giannis [HIGH — NBC Sports]
- Warriors are out [HIGH — Yahoo Sports]
- June 23-24 NBA Draft in Brooklyn is de facto deadline [HIGH]
**Key facts (MEDIUM confidence):**

stories.title: Wembanyama's Bounce-Back Test — Can He Carry the Spurs in New York?
stories.angle: After 29-pt Game 2 effort, errant pass turnover, and missed buzzer — Wemby faces MSG crowd in Game 3; Knicks use "Wemby Drill" with brooms to simulate blocks; he said "we can't change the past / already thinking about Game 3"; elite athlete composure on full display

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Wemby scored 29 points in Game 2.

Then: errant pass turnover. Missed buzzer.

His response: "We can't change the past. We're already thinking about Game 3."

Now he faces MSG in Game 3. Tonight. 8:30 PM ET. #GoSpursGo #NBAFinals

article.headline: 29 Points Wasn't Enough. Now Wembanyama Has to Face MSG in Game 3.

stories.title: Knicks on the Brink of First Championship Since 1973
stories.angle: Two more wins and Knicks end 53-year title drought; no NBA team has ever come back from 3-0 in the Finals; Knicks are only 3rd team to win first 2 Finals games on the road; 13-game win streak with +270 pt differential; swept ECF; ESPN 58.2% win prob tonight

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Knicks haven't won an NBA title since 1973.

That was Willis Reed. Walt Frazier. Before most fans were born.

Tonight: one win from 3-0. No team has EVER blown a 3-0 Finals lead.

Two wins from history. #KnicksTape #NBAFinals

article.headline: Two Wins Away: The Knicks Haven't Won a Title Since 1973 — That Could Change This Week

stories.title: NBA Draft Countdown — AJ Dybantsa Goes No. 1 in 15 Days
stories.angle: June 23-24 draft in Brooklyn is 15 days away; AJ Dybantsa says "100% sure" going No. 1 to Wizards (-450 odds); first Washington No. 1 pick since John Wall 2010; Bucks waiting to finalize Giannis trade until after Finals to maximize leverage

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
AJ Dybantsa at BYU this season:

25.5 PPG
51.0% FG
6-foot-9 wing

He says he's "100% sure" he goes No. 1 to Washington.

The Wizards haven't had the No. 1 pick since John Wall in 2010.

June 23. Brooklyn. #NBADraft #WashingtonWizards
